name: Haunted Gale
additional_info: On proc, gain the Haunted status effect, spawning ghosts that attack your opponent every time you land a Mantra. Having Gale Wisp active increases the duration of Haunted by 3 seconds. If you have Apparitions, landing a Galebreathe Mantra while having the Haunted Gale status effect will create an Apparition instead while non-Galebreathe Mantras will summon Haunted Gale's Ghosts like normal.
desc: Landing 3 Galebreathe Mantras without whiffing calls for a Haunted Phantom. The Phantom will attack alongside you for the next 8s before dissipating.
